# UC-15.4.4 · APC PDU SNMP Per-Outlet Power Draw Trending

## Description

Outlet-level trending attributes growth to specific blades without rack PDUs guessing.

## Value

Supports chargeback and finds zombie gear drawing idle power.

## Implementation

(1) Confirm MIB scaling (0.1 A units). (2) Label outlets in DCIM. (3) Alert on step changes after installs.

## SPL

```spl
index=power sourcetype="snmp:apc:pdu" earliest=-7d
| eval amps=tonumber(coalesce(rPDU2OutletMeteredStatusLoad, rPDU2OutletSwitchedStatusLoad, outlet_amps, ""))/10
| eval outlet=coalesce(outlet_id, outletIndex, "")
| timechart span=1h avg(amps) by pdu_name outlet
```

## Visualization

Multiline per outlet; heatmap.

## References

- [Schneider Electric — APC product support](https://www.se.com/ww/en/product-category/3100-2000-pdu/)
- [Splunk Connect for SNMP](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/apps#/search=connect%20for%20snmp)
